about.summary: Fully equipped studio located at Artemidos 53, Thessaloniki, on the 1st floor of a newly constructed building. Available for 1 person, ideal for Erasmus students and digital nomads.

sections.title: 🏠 Studio Artemidos
sections.content: The studio is found in a newly constructed building, in a really nice neighbourhood and it is fully equipped. It is found on the 1rst floor of the building. Also, it has all electric appliances, washing machine, bed linen & kitchen utensils. Available exclusively for 1 person, 460,00 euros/ month.
highlights: The studio is found in a newly constructed building, in a really nice neighbourhood and it is fully equipped.
It is found on the 1rst floor of the building.
Also, it has all electric appliances, washing machine, bed linen & kitchen utensils.
Available exclusively for 1 person, 460,00 euros/ month.

sections.title: 📍 Location & Neighbourhood
sections.content: Location of the building is Artemidos 53 close to 'Mpotsari & K. Karamanli, 54644, Thessaloniki'. The neighbourhood has all the facilities around (supermarket, market place, bakery, tavern, cafe, bus station) at a distance of 50 meter. Also, the area is really close to the bus station nearby at 50m that goes to city centre and University Campus.
highlights: Location of the building is Artemidos 53 close to 'Mpotsari & K. Karamanli, 54644, Thessaloniki'
The neighbourhood has all the facilities around (supermarket, market place, bakery, tavern, cafe, bus station) at a distance of 50 meter.
Also, the area is really close to the bus station nearby at 50m that goes to city centre and University Campus.

sections.title: 🎓 Ideal for Erasmus Students & Nomads
sections.content:
Studio is ideal for Erasmus Students coming in Thessaloniki for Spring Semester 2023 or for internship at Cedefop in the south of the city. Also, available for Digital Nomads or Remote Workers!

For university info, visit the official pages of Aristotle University of Thessaloniki and City College Europe Campus.

To compare other properties in the building, view our Mpotsari student studio.
highlights: Studio is ideal for Erasmus Students coming in Thessaloniki for Spring Semester 2023
Or for internship at Cedefop in the south of the city.
Also, available for Digital Nomads or Remote Workers!

sections.title: Bills & Services
sections.content:
In the price are included all bills (maintenance, water, heating and WiFi) except from electricity bill. Cleaning service is also available every two weeks with cost 20 euros/ time.

We will be happy to welcome you in Thessaloniki and host you in our studio!

house_rules.additional_rules_info: Smoking allowed outside only. Tenant type: students and working professionals. Not suitable for couples. Playing musical instruments not allowed. Age: no preference. Gender: no preference.

seo.seo_description: Studio Thessaloniki Artemidos is a cozy 1-bed studio in a newly constructed building. Ideal for Erasmus students & digital nomads.
